mapper.sql: command_id AS commandId, plate, vin_topic AS vinTopic, command_type AS commandType, priority, payload, status, mqtt_topic AS mqttTopic, created_by AS createdBy, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO commands ( command_id, plate, vin_topic, command_type, priority, payload, status, mqtt_topic, created_by, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{commandId}, #{plate}, #{vinTopic}, #{commandType}, #{priority}, #{payload}::jsonb, #{status}, #{mqttTopic}, #{createdBy}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, now()), COALESCE(#{createdAt}, now()) )
INSERT INTO command_logs (id, command_id, status, source, raw_payload, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{commandId}, #{status}, #{source}, #{rawPayload}::jsonb, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, now()))
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM commands WHERE plate = #{plate}
SELECT id, command_id AS commandId, status, source, raw_payload AS rawPayload, created_at AS createdAt FROM command_logs WHERE command_id = #{commandId} ORDER BY created_at
